<b>Dodging</b> an instance of damage will <i>skip</i> its damage event entirely, preventing it from being taken and effects that trigger from damage. <i>Dodge</i> takes precedence over <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Block"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying" title="An icon representing the keyword Block"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Block" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/20px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png/40px-Shen_Spirit%27s_Refuge.png?319df 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying" title="Attack effects">block</a></span>, but not <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blind"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blind" title="An icon representing the keyword Blind"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blind" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/20px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blind_icon.png/40px-Blind_icon.png?b97a1 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blind" class="mw-redirect" title="Blind">blind</a></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Effects that <i>dodge</i> damage will only <i>dodge</i> instances that are <i>dodgeable</i>. Note that these are specified in the ability details on the Wiki. 
<br><br>Basic attacks and abilities that apply on-hit effects are always <i>dodged</i>, unless otherwise stated.</p>

<p>
Effects that <i>block</i> damage will only <i>block</i> instances that are <i>blockable</i>. Note that these are specified in the ability details on the Wiki.
<br><br>Basic attacks and abilities that apply on-hit effects are always <i>blocked</i>, unless otherwise stated.</p>

<p>A unit that is <i>blinded</i> will <i>miss</i> their <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attacks</a></span> for the duration, comparable to attacking a target that is able to <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dodge"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying" title="An icon representing the keyword Dodge"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dodge" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike_old.png?95754 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#Parrying" title="Attack effects">dodge</a></span> or <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting" title="An icon representing the keyword On-hit"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting" title="Attack effects">on-hit</a></span> effects, with the exception of some <a href="/en-us/Basic_Attack#Empowered_Basic_Attack" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic Attack">empowered basic attacks</a>. <i>Blind</i> does not prevent the unit from declaring attacks, unlike <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Disarm"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Disarm" title="An icon representing the keyword Disarm"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Disarm" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Disarm_icon.png/20px-Disarm_icon.png?41bf4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Disarm_icon.png/40px-Disarm_icon.png?41bf4 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Disarm" class="mw-redirect" title="Disarm"><b>Disarm</b></a></span>.

position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champions</a></span> benefit from the <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ultra_Rapid_Fire/Patch_and_Buff_History#Buff_History" title="An icon for the Awesome Buff of Awesomely Awesome Buffing buff in Ultra Rapid Fire"><img alt="An icon for the Awesome Buff of Awesomely Awesome Buffing buff in Ultra Rapid Fire" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png/20px-Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png?eced0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png/40px-Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png?eced0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ultra_Rapid_Fire/Patch_and_Buff_History#Buff_History" title="Ultra Rapid Fire/Patch and Buff History">Awesome Buff of Awesomely Awesome Buffing</a> that grants excessive ability haste and removes ability costs. The gameplay is <i>explosive</i>. The game mode can be played as <i><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="All random"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/All_random" title="An icon representing the keyword All random"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword All random" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Reroll.png/20px-Reroll.png?9383d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Reroll.png/40px-Reroll.png?9383d 2x" data-file-width="150" data-file-height="150"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/All_random" class="mw-redirect" title="All random">All Random</a></span></i> or <i><a href="/en-us/Blind_pick" class="mw-redirect" title="Blind pick">Blind pick</a></i> depending on the year.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/44px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_icon.png/88px-Arena_icon.png?c4c60 2x" data-file-width="210" data-file-height="210"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Arena</span></div>
<figure class="mw-halign-right" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Arena_Promo_03.jpg" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_Promo_03.jpg/250px-Arena_Promo_03.jpg?b6d6e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="250" height="129" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arena_Promo_03.jpg/500px-Arena_Promo_03.jpg?b6d6e 2x" data-file-width="4800" data-file-height="2480"></a><figcaption></figcaption></figure> <b>Arena</b> is a team deathmatch game mode organized in a tournament format that consists of eight teams of two players fighting on six different battlefields. Teams brawl in rotating combat rounds while powering themselves up with unique Augments and Items and using multiple environmental features to their advantage, in a display of both deeply tactical and highly explosive combat until the last team standing.
<dl><dt>Regular Modes</dt></dl>
<ul><li><i>8-Team Round-Robin Tournament</i></li></ul>
<dl><dt>Battlefields — The Grand Reckoning</dt>
<dd></dd></dl>
<ul><li><i>Ancestral Woods</i></li>
<li><i>Desert Oasis</i></li>
<li><i>Frostbite Thicket</i></li>
<li><i>Koi Pond</i></li>
<li><i>Magma Chamber</i></li>
<li><i>Reckoner Arena</i></li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/44px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/88px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Edge range</span></div>
<p><b>Edge range</b> is calculated from the <b>edge</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>edge</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Edge range is mostly used for <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attacks</a>; <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Direction-targeted" title="Targeting">skill shots</a>; and point-blank areas of effect (including <a href="/en-us/Aura" title="Aura">auras</a>).</li>
<li>These become <i>more</i> effective against large champions, as the source gains more reach against them. This may be favorable or unfavorable: durable champions tend to be larger and thus easier to hit, and frail champions tend to be smaller and more difficult to hit.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/44px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Slow</span></div>
A unit that is <i>slowed</i> has reduced <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed">movement speed</a></span> for the duration. <i>Slows</i> based on a percentage value cannot reduce a target below <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">110 movement speed</span></span>. Some <i>slows</i> will instead modify the target's <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">movement speed</span> to a static value, which may not be further reduced nor increased.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Only the slow with the highest value is taken into movement speed calculations. All additional slows are ignored until the higher-valued slow wears off. The strength of slows may amplify or decay over their duration. Slows of the same debuff cannot stack and will instead refresh on each application unless otherwise stated.</p><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Negative <i>slow</i> values will increase the unit's <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">movement speed</span> instead.</p>
<hr style="border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 2px 0px;">

A <b>stack</b> refers to a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Buff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Buff" title="An icon representing the keyword Buff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/20px-Promote.png?7b9a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Promote.png/40px-Promote.png?7b9a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buff</a></span> or <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">debuff</a></span> that can be increased in count under certain circumstances. Stacking effects with durations will refresh per instance, unless otherwise stated.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Stacking effects that time out may cause all stacks to expire at once or one by one in given intervals, depending on the source.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/44px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Airborne</span></div>
<p>A unit that is knocked <i>airborne</i> undergoes a <i>forced displacement</i> in a specified direction, to a specific point, or for a set duration at its current location, during which it is also <p>
Crowd control applied by one's self or an ally cannot be countered in any way, neither <i>reduced</i> in duration, <i>resisted</i>, nor <i>removed</i> unless special cased to do so.
</p><ul><li>The crowd control effect may still be <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="Crowd control">cleansed</a></span> if it is applied as a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; <p>
Crowd control applied by one's self or an ally cannot be countered in any way, neither <i>reduced</i> in duration, <i>resisted</i>, nor <i>removed</i> unless special cased to do so.
</p><ul><li>The crowd control effect may still be <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="Crowd control">cleansed</a></span> if it is applied as a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">debuff</a></span> separate from the originated ability.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fiora_Bladework.png/44px-Fiora_Bladework.png?1fcc5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Fiora_Bladework.png?1fcc5 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Basic attack reset</span></div>
An <b>attack reset</b> is a mechanic that will result in a champion's attack timer being reset to zero. When this effect takes place during the basic attack's cooldown and not its windup, it allows the attacker to start a second attack quicker than normal.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Certain abilities and item actives can reset the attack timer upon use. <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Hail of Blades" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades" title="An icon representing Hail of Blades"><img alt="An icon representing Hail of Blades" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/20px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hail_of_Blades_rune.png/40px-Hail_of_Blades_rune.png?9b79e 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Hail_of_Blades" title="Hail of Blades">Hail of Blades</a></span></span> generates an additional <a href="/en-us/Stack" title="Stack">stack</a> of its effect each time the user casts an ability or spell that has an <b>attack reset</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ziggs_Mega_Inferno_Bomb.png/44px-Ziggs_Mega_Inferno_Bomb.png?af8a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Ziggs_Mega_Inferno_Bomb.png?af8a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Area damage</span></div>
<p><i>Area damage</i> is the damage type dealt by most <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Abilities"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability" src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a></span> and some <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a> and <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a> that can hit targets within a zone. <i>Area damage</i> applies <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="Ability effects">spell effects</a></span> by default.
</p>
<ul><li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Jax" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Jax" title="An icon representing Jax"><img alt="An icon representing Jax" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Jax_OriginalSquare.png?6209d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Jax_OriginalSquare.png?6209d 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Jax" title="Jax">Jax's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Jax" data-ability="Counter Strike" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Jax#Counter_Strike" title="An icon for Jax's ability Counter Strike"><img alt="An icon for Jax's ability Counter Strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike.png?a3a78" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike.png?a3a78 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Jax#Counter_Strike" title="Jax">Counter Strike</a></span></span></span> grants him 25% damage reduction against all incoming <i>area damage</i>.</li>

<ul><li>Some <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ranged"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ranged" title="An icon representing the keyword Ranged"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ranged" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ranged_role.png/20px-Ranged_role.png?62375" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ranged_role.png/40px-Ranged_role.png?62375 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ranged" class="mw-redirect" title="Ranged">ranged</a></span> basic attacks (<i>including <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Turrets"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Turret" title="An icon representing the keyword Turret"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Turret" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Turret_icon.png/20px-Turret_icon.png?74c22" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Turret_icon.png/40px-Turret_icon.png?74c22 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Turret" title="Turret">turrets</a></span></i>) and abilities don't use projectiles and will bypass projectile-blocking effects.</li></ul></li>
<li>Some abilities will <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Homing projectile destruction"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Homing projectile destruction"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Homing projectile destruction" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/20px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bullet_strikethrough.png/40px-Bullet_strikethrough.png?5a522 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">destroy</a></span> all currently incoming homing projectiles.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/44px-Revival_icon.png?4c111" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Revival_icon.png?4c111 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Resurrection</span></div>
A unit that is protected by <b>Resurrection</b> will enter a revival state and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dispel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Dispel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dispel" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/20px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/40px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">dispel</a></span> most <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">debuffs</a></span> upon taking <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Death"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death" title="An icon representing the keyword Death"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Death" src="/en-us/images/Death_icon.svg?70f06" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="52" data-file-height="52"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death" title="Death">fatal damage</a></span>. After the state completes, the unit is revived. <b>Resurrection</b> effects do not count for kills or assists.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Resurrection</b> sources have a hierarchy, and will trigger in the following order:
